channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sen. Blackburn Revives Ban Birth Tourism Act
item.description: Sen. Marsha Blackburn, R-Tenn., has reintroduced legislation that would ban birth as a basis for obtaining a temporary U.S. visa.

item.title: House Republicans aim to turn Democratic civil war into midterm weapon
item.description: Mike Lawler warns that radical socialists are taking over the Democratic Party as GOP fights to hold swing seats in suburban New York midterms.

item.title: In Latest Blow to Conspiracy Theorists, Rand Paul Says Mitch McConnell Is Planning His Return to Senate
AIPAC Removes Donation Buttons for Democrats
item.description: AIPAC has removed donation buttons for Democrats who voted to cut aid to Israel from its campaign website.
